remarks: Welcome home to this bright and airy, second floor end-unit condominium. The spacious living room is anchored by a cozy fireplace, while the bright eat-in kitchen offers the perfect spot for morning coffee or casual meals. Enjoy the generous primary bedroom, great closet space, the convenience of in-unit laundry and comfortable one-level living. Nestled in a beautifully maintained community featuring a clubhouse and sparkling pool, this exceptional home offers the ideal blend of comfort, convenience, and lifestyle.
